title: NTPC Capital India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: NTPC Capital India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, NTPC Capital India in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About NTPC Capital India:
NTPC Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NTPC Capital India!
